nodes.context: Secret society and gang based in Singapore, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, prostitution, white-collar crime.
Rival gang of Salakau in Singapore.

edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.
edges.context: Salakau routinely attacked Sakongsa as a rival gang.
